S.FORM: == myugi == Laqi mrkyas ru krakis qalang ga tehok kawas naha la ru, masuq lga msqun mnbux qwaw ro mstopaw myugi sinqqas.
S.PHON: == mjuɣi == laqi mrkjas~ɕ ru krakis~ɕ qalaŋ ɣa teħok kawas~ɕ naħa la ru, mas~ɕuq lɣa ms~ɕqun mnβux qwaw ro ms~ɕtopaw mjuɣi s~ɕinqqas~ɕ.
S.FORM: == myugi == Laqi mrkyas ru krakis qalang ga tehok kawas naha la ru, masuq lga msqun mnbux qwaw ro mstopaw myugi sinqqas.
S.PHON: == mjuɣi == laqi mrkjas~ɕ ru krakis~ɕ qalaŋ ɣa teħok kawas~ɕ naħa la ru, mas~ɕuq lɣa ms~ɕqun mnβux qwaw ro ms~ɕtopaw mjuɣi s~ɕinqqas~ɕ.
